title: Survival's Instinct
description: A modpack with enhanced world generation, dynamic sounds, and tough survival mechanics. Explore, build, and survive in an immersive world while making sure it's lightweight.
body:
## **This modpack is still experimental** This modpack is currently available only for version **1.20.1**. I will update it regularly and try other mods when something interesting is found. Stay tuned!
## About this Modpack **Survival's Instinct** is a modpack designed for players seeking a challenging and immersive survival experience. It balances performance optimization with engaging mechanics, offering a perfect mix of difficulty and adventure. With improved world generation, dynamic sounds, and an expansive dungeon-crawling experience, you’ll need to carefully manage your resources, brace yourself for unpredictable dangers, and survive until the end.
### **This is the modpack I use when I want to enjoy solo survival adventures.**
## This Modpack Was Tested on This System Here’s the system setup I used: ### 1. PC - Avg **315 FPS** with BSL Shaders **Enabled** | Component | Specification | |------------|-------------------------------| | CPU | AMD Ryzen 7 9700X | | GPU | RTX 5070 12GB | | RAM | 64GB |
### 2. Laptop: MSI GF63-9SCSR - Avg **110 FPS** with BSL Shaders **Enabled** | Component | Specification | |------------|-------------------------------| | CPU | Intel i7-9750H | | GPU | GTX 1650 Ti (Max-Q Design) | | RAM | 24GB |
## Additional Support me on: - [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/nakirium) - [Buy me a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/nakirium)
